info.name: Voleena API Audit Collection
info.description: Generated from server/scripts/generate-api-artifacts.js for API audit and regression coverage.

request.description:
Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: -
Success: 200 { status, timestamp, uptime, environment }
Errors: 500

Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: email, password
Success: 200 { success, token, refreshToken, user, expiresIn }
Errors: 400, 401, 500

Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: email, password
Success: 200 { success, token, refreshToken, user, expiresIn }
Errors: 400, 401, 403 EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED, 500

Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: name, email, phone, password, profileImageUrl?
Success: 201 { success, requiresEmailVerification, emailSent, message }
Errors: 400, 409, 500

Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: token
Success: 200 { success, message }
Errors: 400 invalid/used/expired token, 500

Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: email
Success: 200 generic success response
Errors: 400, 429, 500

Auth: Bearer token + X-Refresh-Token or body.refreshToken
Query: -
Body: refreshToken?
Success: 200 { success, token, refreshToken, user, expiresIn }
Errors: 401, 500

Auth: Bearer token
Query: -
Body: -
Success: 200 { success, message }
Errors: 401, 400, 500

Auth: Bearer token
Query: -
Body: -
Success: 200 { success, user }
Errors: 401

Success: 200 generic reset initiation response
Errors: 400, 429, 500

Body: email, otp
Success: 200 verification success
Errors: 400, 429, 500

Auth: Public
Query: -
Body: email, otp, password
Success: 200 reset success
Errors: 400, 429, 500

Auth: Bearer Cashier/Admin

Success: 200 { success, data }
Errors: 404, 500

Success: 200 { success, data }

Query: -

Auth: Bearer Admin

Auth: Bearer Admin

Auth: Bearer Admin/Kitchen
Query: -
Body: Name, Description?, Price, CategoryID, IsActive?, ImageURL?
Success: 201 { success, data }
Errors: 400, 404, 500

body.raw:
{
  "Name": "Chicken Rice",
  "Description": "Steamed rice with chicken curry",
  "Price": 1200,
  "CategoryID": 1,
  "IsActive": true
}
